name: Jaffar ibn Aqeel
title: Hashemite Youth
shortDescription: A brave youth from the sons of Aqeel ibn Abi Talib who went to the battlefield reciting poetry on Ashura and was martyred.
fullStory:
Ja'far ibn Aqeel ibn Abi Talib was the brother of Muslim ibn Aqeel and one of the zealous youths of Bani Hashem. His mother was 'Hawsa' daughter of 'Amr ibn 'Amir.

He came to Karbala alongside Imam Hussain (AS) with other sons and grandsons of Aqeel. On Ashura, when it was the turn of Bani Hashem to fight, Ja'far went to the battlefield.

He recited poetry in the battlefield saying: 'I am the Abtahi youth from the family of Abu Talib, from the descent of Hashim and Ghalib; undoubtedly we are the best of people, and this is Hussain who is the purest of the pure.'

He fought bravely and killed a number of the enemy forces until he attained martyrdom at the hands of Bishr ibn Khawt al-Hamdani (or Abdullah ibn 'Uzra).
quoteArabic: أَنَا الغُلامُ الأَبْطَحِيُّ الطّالِبِيُّ... مِنْ هاشِمٍ وَغالِبٍ...
quote: (His Rajaz in battle:) I am the Abtahi youth from the family of Abu Talib, from the descent of Hashim and Ghalib...
